text:
A {PClan{x is a family with a collection of players, united to follow
and further a common cause.   Each {PClan{x has rules and regulations, to find
out more about Clans and their '{Gbeliefs{x' type "{Phelp{x <{Yclan name{x>".
To join a {PClan{x you  must be at or above level 15.  Speak to a {PClan Leader{x 
or a {BClan Deputy{x about joining; however, if you are unable to speak to them, 
please note them that you wish to join their {PClan{x.

   If you find you have joined the wrong {Pclan{x for some reason, you may
be expelled from your {PClan{x and be free to look around for another {PClan{x

   Joining a {PClan{x is a dangerous step.   Many adventurers live to
kill and torture others and chances are that your paths will cross.
Remember, attacking or killing fellow {PClan members{x is generally frowned upon,
and may bring {Ph{Ra{Pr{Rs{Ph{x punishment upon you from your clan leaders.{x

   If you want to create a clan, check out {YHELP STARTCLAN{x for more
information.

   {PClans{x may on occasion engage in {RClan Wars{x. There are detailed and
explicit rules for conduct of a {RClan War{x. Type help '{YCLANWAR{X' to see them.

At {BL{Ce{gg{Wa{Cc{By{x, enhancing your experience with role-playing is one of the
many aspects of making this the best possible mud you will ever find.
Joining an existing clan, or starting your own, can be a very 
rewarding experience for most players.  However, to ensure and
preserve the clan system's quality as a whole, there is a system to
starting a new clan.

{W1.{x Your clan must have a {Ppurpose{x.  All clans should be {Vrole-play 
   oriented{x, and it's {Gname{x and {Ybackground{x must reflect that.  A
   helpfile will be required of your clan which includes explanations
   of at least (but not limited to) the
   
         {CI.   Background / History 
         II.  Rules / Principles
         III. Ranks / Hierarchy Structure{x
   
   All of the above need to well-thought out and really explain to
   the immortals as well as the mud as a whole why your clan deserves
   space to be recognized, and why players should choose your clan.  
   Uniqueness of roleplay will always be an important factor.  

{W2.{x You will need the following support in terms of {Gplayers{x:
          
         {W2 {YLeaders{x (50+ levels)
         {W5 {BMembers{x
        {W10 {VLetters of Support{x from non-members
         
      {CNote:{x each player may only give support from ONE alt and each
            alt may only count for ONE category
    
{W3.{x  You will need to meet the following requirements in terms of
    wealth (to be derived from any combo of the original 7 members)
    
         {Y1000   Quest Points  {B::half of the amounts return to clan::
         {Y10000  Gold{x          {B::to begin clanqp & clanbalance acct::

{W4.{x  At this point, you are ready to send in your request with all of
    the above requested information to {CLegacyImms@yahoo.com{x.  The    
    chance of your clan being approved rests on many factors,
    including space available for clans, fulfillment of requirements,
    and general overall playerbase support.  

{W5.{x  If your clan is approved, the fees in {YQP{x and {YGold{x will be taken
    from the characters at this time.  In return, you shall receive
    the default clanhall as well as 10 pieces of clan equipment, 
    which your leaders shall design.   When these are done, send them
    to {CLegacyImms@yahoo.com{x, to get them implemented ASAP.
    
{W6.{x  By now, your {Pstruggle{x is almost over.  Your last hurdle shall be
    your probationary month, during which your clan must gain at
    least {B10 members{x total (not including alts).  At the end of this
    month, if you have passed all six of the steps ... 
    
            {WC{CO{BN{VG{PR{YA{GT{WU{CL{BA{VT{PI{YO{GN{WS{C!{B!{V!  {GYou will have a new clan{Y!{B!{C!{x

{YSEE ALSO:{x Help CEQ, Help Chall

{CClanhalls{x

Clans are entitled to many luxuries, one of them being a clanhall. In
the near future, clanhalls will be able to be invaded in times of war.
However for now, they are safe havens for clanmembers to rest, relax, 
and congegrate with other members.

Each {Gdefault clanhall{x starts out with:

         20 rooms
          2 clanpills
          1 healer (lvl 100)
          1 trainer
          1 eq shopkeeper
             * 10 pieces of eq (help ceq for more details)
          1 food shopkeeper
             * 10 items of food/drink 
          1 piece of furniture
          1 fountain
            
However, {Vmuch more{x can be purchased, at the {YQP{x price of:

         Extra Rooms             50 each
         Juke Box                50
         Fountains               75
         Furniture              100
         Portals (max 3)        100
         Clan Sage              200
         Money Changer          100
         Locker/Bank access     200
         Anvil                  750
         Clan Pit               250
         Clan Arena             100 per room
         Pet Shop               200 + 100 per pet
         Shopkeeper             200 + 20 per item sold
           (for bags etc) 

{BNotes:{x

Healers can be upgraded at {Y10k gold{x per level.  Each 10th level
requires {Y200qp{x as well.

Furniture may only have a maximum of {G100{x over normal {Cregeneration{x,
distributed any way you choose.  Examples - 150/150, 120/180, 100/200
are all allowed.

Clan Anvils have a {YQP{x cost of only {Y3{x per each attempted {Pflag forge{x.

All items sold must be cleared with the {WHead Builder{x.  The extra
shopkeeper shall only be used for miscellaneous, grocer type items.

{YSEE ALSO:{x Help Claneq, Help Clanprice

{CClan Prices{x


Besides adding to the clanhall, clanqp and gold can be spent to
enhance or add to claneq, as well as obtain a very interesting
variety of items and conveniences.  


{BEnhancement{x of {CClan Equipment{x

You may buy extra points to {Benhance{x your {Cclan equipment{x at {Y100 QP{x each.
Each {Vpiece{x of equipment can have no more than {Gdouble{x it's original
point value.  

{GExample:{x A {Plevel 10 ring{x starts out with 3 points.  You can add up to
         another 3 points, for {Y300 qp{x.


{VAdditional {CClan Equipment{x

Additional pieces of eq can be bought (with their starting point 
value included) for {Y200 qp{x each for the {Pfirst five{x, and then an
extra {Y200 qp{x per piece each time you exceed another {P5{x.  For {Gexample{x,
if you want to buy another {V10 pieces{x of {Beq{x, the first {P5{x would cost
{Y200 qp{x each, the next would cost {Y400 qp{x each.

You may not have more than {G30 pieces{x of {CClan EQ{x.


{YSEE ALSO:{x Help Claneq, Help Clanhall

{PThese guidelines must be STRICTLY adhered to when making eq for mortals.{x

{CThis helpfile has been designed to allow immortals to make eq for their followers
or for those mortals that complete one of their sets with 50 of each of their tokens.{x

{WHere are a few simple rules regarding issuing mortals eq with these stats.
1. All imm issued eq must be ownered to the mortal receiving it.
2. You may give your followers ONE piece of eq at your discretion to be used
only for the term either you specify or at maximum while they are your follower.
3.Every piece of imm eq should have your name and what is was given for in the 
name section. example : Qaz gives out a "dagger of blood" to Napalm for being a 
follower of his. The name of the eq may be: dagger blood follower Qaz, if it 
were for a set it may read: dagger blood set Qaz
4.Please use common sense with this privelage and that means do not go giving
every mortal that follows you a piece of eq. Anyone having questions regarding
how to use this privelage should see Vegita and he can give you great examples
of this.{x

Each point allows one of the following: 
+1 str, int, wis, dex, con or chr. 
+10 hps, mana, or move 
+2 hit or dam 
+1 hit AND +1 dam 
-1 saves
-3 armor class 
+1 age

The allocated points by level of item are: 

    Level Range               Default Points 
       1 -  9                        3.5  
      10 - 19                        4.5
      20 - 29                        5.5
      30 - 39                        6.5
      40 - 49                        7.5
      50 - 59                        8.5
      60 - 69                        9.5
      70 - 79                       10 .5
      80 - 90                       11.5

Restrictions: 
1) An item cannot have HR or DR greater than 1/10th + 1 of its level.
2) Total stats (eg. str, int, etc...) added together cannot be greater 
   than 1/10th + 1 of the item's level. 
3) The total of saves cannot be greater than 1/20th + 1 of the item's level,
   rounded down to the nearest whole number.
4) Armor class cannot be greater than 1/10th + 1 of the item's level. 
5) Total hp, mana and moves cannot be higher than the level of the item. 
6) An item cannot have age greater than 1/20th + 1 of its level, rounded down
   to the nearest whole number.

Example: A level 50 piece of eq starts out with 7 points.  Therefore, it 
could have +2 str, +40 hp, and +2 dam, as an acceptable allocation. 
However, it could NOT have any more than 50 hp, because of restriction 
number 5. 

Also, negative points CAN be used to add points for other affects but 
within the same group only and with a 50% payback rate.  You gain 1
point per 2 negative points you take.  Max negative points that can be
used to compensate is 1/20th + 1 of the item's level.  Note that restrictions
cannot be exceeded with this method.

Level:            Dice:            Points:       Average:
1-9               1d20               2              10
10-19             2d20               3              22
20-29             3d20               4              33
30-39             4d20               5              44
40-49             5d20               6              56
50-59             6d20               7              66
60-69             7d20               8              78
70-79             8d20               9              89
80-91             9d20              10              99
[Hit Enter to continue]

of two per clan.  Each clanweapon you choose to design costs

Syntax:
{x   {Cclanqp{x
{x   {Cclanqp donate{x <{Yamount{x>

The {Cclanqp{x command enables clanmembers to donate questpoints to their clan.
The clan can then decide on what to spend the questpoints, for example on a 
clan anvil.  Without an argument, {Cclanqp{x will show the current gold and
qp that your clan possesses, along with other useful information.

Syntax:
{x   {Cclandeposit {x<{Yamount{x>

{CClandeposit{x allows you to donate gold to your clan.  The amount you
donate must be gold that you carry on your person, and there must be a
bank at the location that you are standing.  To see the current amount
of gold in your clan's account, use the {Cclanqp{x command.

{x
{R    "It was a cold morning, the kind where the wind just cuts
     through your body as if you were butter.  Cannons were firing
     off in the distance, accompanied by the thunderous pounding of
     horses' hooves.  Two groups of people, gathered on two 
     opposite hills, slowly faced off.  Suddenly, a cry pierced the
     silence, and the battlers charged towards each other, meeting
     with a tremendous crash as grunts of effort and cries of pain
     filled the air.  Yes, war had fallen upon us again ... "{x
                                    
{g                                       - {PAnonymous Diary{x

Syntax:  {Cwar list
	 war history
	 war events {W<{Ywar number{W>{x

Being in a clan has many benefits, but it also requires that you defend
your clan in times of war.  Wars can be declared by any clan on any 
other clan, by a simple majority vote of leaders.  Being involved in a
war means you are open to attack at any time by a member of the opposing
clan, and is a very serious struggle between two or more clans.  War is 
not to be taken lightly.

{CWar list{x lists all the current wars going on at this time.  The
challenger is listed first, and then the defender, with each respective
score listed by the clan name.  If there are none, you will see a 
message saying that Legacy is at peace.

{CWar history{x lists the history of all the wars that have been fought on
Legacy in numbered format.  It uses the same format as war list.

{CWar events{x shows you each individual event that comprises the war.  
During the war, each kill of a member of {VClan A{x on a member of {BClan B {x
decreases the score of {BClan B{x.  The first clan that reaches a score of
{Wzero{x loses the war.  The amount that is decreased per kill depends on a 
variety of factors, one of them {PPK rating{x.

Each completed war results in a transfer of {GFame{x from the defeated clan
to the victorious clan.  Also, they each respectively lose and gain {PMight{x
depending on how drastic the win was.

Syntax:
{x   {Cclanpower{x

{CClanpower{x displays the graphed power of the various clans of Legacy.
Four factors determine the overall power of a clan:  {CSize{x (number of
members), {GFame{x (clanqp), {YWealth{x (clangold), and {PMight{x (war points).  

The current ranking of each clan as compared to the others is represented
using black bar graphs (so you may need to change the background color of
your mud client).  Each factor is weighted equally in determining overall
clan ranking, and the clans are listed in order of decreasing power.

Each clan may have one to {Gthree{x leaders, and up to {Gfive{x deputies.  The
{Yleaders{x usually are the founders of the clan, but sometimes others will
step up to assume leadership.  They {Vrepresent the clan overall{x and their
commands are followed without question.  {BDeputies{x are essentially the
{Vsecond-in-command{x.  They do not choose clan policy or direction, but 
instead, help with recruitment and monitoring of members.  Each {Cclan{x has
it's own method of choosing {Yleaders{x and {Bdeputies{x, whether it be by vote
or selection.  However,  the following notes must be received from the
immortals for the {Cselection{x or {Premoval{x of a player to be valid.  Beware
who you place in leadership positions, for they represent your clan.

The {Cselection{x of a {Bdeputy{x requires one leader's approval.
     (Deputies must be over level {G50{x)
To {Premove{x a deputy requires all leaders' approval.

The {Cselection{x of a {Yleader{x requires all leaders' approval.
     (Leaders must be at over level {G91{x)
To {Premove{x a leader requires all deputies' approval.

Leaders and deputies{x may also be removed by the {Vimmortals{x if they are 
{Ginactive{x, OR by an {Poverwhelming {W(80%){x vote of the {Cclan{x as a whole.

Leaders are {Cdenoted{x with a {Yyellow flag{x on the who list.
Deputies are {Cdenoted{x with a {Bblue flag{x on the who list.

{YSEE ALSO:{x Help Join

Syntax:
   {Vjoin{x <{Yplayername{x>
   {Vunjoin{x <{Yplayername{x>
   {Vrank{x <{Yplayername{x> <{Ycode{x>
   {Vrank{x <{Yplayername{x> {Ynone{x

These commands help sort out the ranks of clans and their members.

The code in the rank command is limited to a {Pthree character word{x which
can only be set by {Cleaders of clans{x on their clan members.	{CLeaders{x are
urged to treat this as a privilege granted to only the best clan members.
The {Vrank player {Ynone{x command will clear their rank.

{YSEE ALSO:{x Help Leader

Syntax: {Vinvite{x <{Yplayer{x>
	{Vinvite{x accept
	{Vinvite{x decline
	{Vinvite{x terminate
	{Vinvite{x terminate <{Yplayer{x>

By using the invite command, a {Cleader{x of a clan can allow a player who is not
a member of the clan to enter the clan hall.  The player who receives an
invitation can either accept or decline the invitation.  By accepting the
invitation, the player agrees to pay a fee of {C100 gold{x.  If at any time you
wish to end your invitation after you have accepted it, just use the termination
command.  In addition, a leader can terminate an invitation at any time.

The person who requested  a non-clan member to be invited will be held
responsible for the conduct of the non-clan member while they are
visiting. That person will know the whereabouts of the non-clan member at
all times to ensure that the integrity of the invite command is not
compromised in any way. Punishment for any violation will be the
responsibility of the leader who ordered the invite command for the
non-clan member.

Syntax: {Vclanrecall{x

This returns a person to their {PClan{x hall.

Syntax:

   {Vclanlist{x
   {Vclanlist{x <{Yclan{x>

{VClanlist{x without an argument will show all current {PClans{x and all
disbanded {PClans{x.  {VClanlist{x with an argument will show the current
members of a given {PClan{x.

Syntax: {Rclantalk{x {Ymessage{x
	{Rclantalk who{x
	{Rclantalk{x

This command is for communication among clan members. Your {Ymessage{x
will be heard by all others in your clan, if they have their clantalk
channel turned on.

Typing {Rclantalk{x without any messages turns the channel off for you
if you don't want to hear from your clan, or turns it back on if off.

{Rclantalk who{x will tell you who else is tuned in to this channel
at the moment.

Fortified through contless travails we stand strong;
Bound by honour,
Tempered by wisdom,
Diverse in origin and profession,
United in vision and purpose,
In search of truth,
We protect and serve Thera and her denizens.
We are the Order of the Blue Rose.


Ranks of the {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x

[{NR{Ce{Nc{x] Recruit, (level 15 to 20) The "Newbies" of the clan. This phase is
       used to teach the players devotion to the clan and hone their abilities.
[{NS{Cq{Nr{x] Squire, (level 21 to 50) The "Knights in Training":The true phase of self
       progression, wherein physically and mentally the player grows toward
       Knighthood.
[{NK{Cn{Nt{x] Knight, (level 51 to 91) The "Knight": Finally a true warrior is granted
       with this fine title, All the leaders must agree that the Player is
       worthy of the title, for now the member is allowed to have more freedoms
       and powers than ever before...
[{NM{Cs{Nt{x] Master, (level R1 15 to 40) The "Master" These fine members are capable
       of overruling the lower member levels of the clan at wars. Of course,
       this does not entitle the masters to control the lower level players, but
       in times of war, those with greater experience and knowledge will be
       given more authority to determine war strategies, as well as who actually
       fights. Of course, even a Master would have to bow before Tac's, for the
       latter specialises in military tactics
After R1 level 40, players may have whatever rank they wish.

Also:
Guardian [{NG{Cu{Na{x]  Those who have shown great skill at PK
Lord Wizard [{NL{Cr{NW{x]  Those who make scrolls and potions for the Blue Rose.
Recruiter [{NR{Cc{Nt{x]  Those who go about newbies to recruit them for our order
General [{NT{Ca{Nc{x]   ( Tactical Advisor )
Ambassador [{ND{Cm{Nt{x]   ( Diplomat ) Important for forging alliances and treaties.
Leader [{YLDR{x]


A Word of Warning:

We, bound by blood and mutual honour, serve as the guardians of justice and 
the people. Those who attack us are at war with all good people of Thera. 
This includes, but is not restricted to, those who sideswipe us or engage us
in warfare. With this in mind, those who do evil are due neither our respect
nor our mercy.  -- only DESTRUCTION. It is no less than the DUTY of all 
{NK{Bn{Ci{Wg{Ch{Bt{Ns of the {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x to reduce such varlets 
to a bit of blood spoor and the fleeting memory of the villain(s)' vile 
existence. If this means that we get a few {RKILLER{x flags, so be it. We 
will defend our clan by any resources of strength, sorcery and stealth that
we can muster. Otherwise, we will be honourable with our opponents, accepting
their surrenders graciously. Individuals who offend us shall be placed onto
the List of the Black Rose; these fallen lot shall be subject to our extreme
ill will and we will take every opportunity to kill them. Redemption shall be
at OUR discretion.

As for honour in METHODS of PK, understand this -- the object of ANY PK
combat, ESPECIALLY during wartime, is to WIN, not posture and moralise. 
Anything goes in PK; whoever says otherwise is lying to themselves. We don't
advocate breaking the rules, but otherwise anything goes. Any trick, tool or
resource at our command shall be used to defend our clan and the innocent in
the most efficient way possible. This is our code of honour, and woe to those
who would impugn it.

{NT{Bh{Ne {NH{Bi{Cs{Wt{Co{Br{Ny of t{Bh{Ne {NO{Br{Cd{Be{Cr of t{Bh{Ne {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x

Thera. A world of beauty, of plenty, of happiness...
   The world was perfect in almost every aspect. The only thing that marred
its perfection was the people who walked upon it. They loved, they hated,
they gave birth and they brought death. All in mere seconds on a cosmic
scale did they grow and die, yet they changed the face of Thera forever.
These people, of many races, tended to be social animals and developed
into groups known as clans. These clans brought war upon one another, They
began to destroy the face of Thera. But one clan sought to cure this
disease: the {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms {Xof the Dizzy {MTable{x. Under the rule and guidance of
Queen Buttercup, they fought for what was right and true. And for a while
they won.
   Alas, the evil clans quickly gained in strength and determination. The
defenders of Thera were quickly shackled, both from without and from
foolish rhetoric and squabbling from within. Likewise, in the heavens
corruption took root as the powers of Righteousness were overwhelmed by
power-maddened djinn. Finally, one of the princes, Brian,
denounced the rhetoric that forbade the killing of unwary foes. As he and
a few other {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x led by the {CS{Ym{Cu{Yr{Cf{Y Lord{x Doom began to fight back against
the dark armies, the tide began to turn. But alas, the djinn sought to
hold the {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x to that foolish ban, and laid a curse upon the very
grounds of their clan hall. Being thus forbidden from effectively
defending their clan,  the {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x were left no choice but to flee and
turn westward, taking Queen Buttercup with them in search of a place to
hide and regroup. But the darkness has many forms. Disman, once a member
of this holy order, had turned to the darkness.He gave the Queen a red
rose that was laced with a tailored poison.
   It was not meet to merely kill the Queen outright, for she would become
a martyr and thus would the {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms {Xof the Dizzy {MTable{x fight all the
harder to destroy her murderers and avenge her. Rather, a slow decline
would distract and thus dispirit her loyal vanguard. And so she fell
deathly ill on the exodus.
   Even then the enemy pursued them. Just as the queen collapsed, one of
the dark princes, accompanied by a black-cloaked sorcerer, sought to
dispatch her with a dagger. Seeing this, Brian intervened, drawing his
sword and cleaving both dagger and Dark Prince in one lightning-swift motion, but not before he uttered his last words, "May the most
beautiful flower kill the most beautiful coward". On the queen's other
side, {YLord{x Doom dispatched the sorcerer.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
   That night, in the mountains the {CH{Yo{Cl{Yy {CS{Ym{Cu{Yr{Cf {YLord {xKung Fu, the {BLord
Wizard{x Laurana and {YPrince{x Brian called upon healing magicks and placed
their queen into stasis, keeping her alive until they could find a cure
for the weakness that had permeated her body.
   Brian, Lord Doom, Lord Kung Fu and all of the other {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x vowed upon
that day to change forever. To reshape Thera forever. Never to hide behind
the lies and fantasies of others again. To build a new life for themselves
and their families, and create a new world in which justice could triumph
over evil and all could know peace. But first, they had to find a place to
live...
   Anon a beautiful, dark-haired lady came along. "Greetings, friends," she
called, smiling at both Lord Kung Fu and Prince Brian. "What do you seek
in this forest?"
   "Milady," Brian replied, bowing to her, "we seek sanctuary for ourselves
and our queen; she has been poisoned and must rest and regain her strength
or die."
   "Also," added Lord Kung Fu as he duplicated Brian's gesture of respect,
"we are pursued by a force of demons and djinn. We must find a place
wherein we can regroup and regain our strength to better defend ourselves
against their depradations."
   The lady nodded gravely, studying each {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x in turn. "Yes, you serve a
worthy cause. This being the case," she continued, "know that I, too, came
here to find sanctuary against vile djinn who sought to corrupt my efforts
to serve mortals through magick. When I would not bend to their will, they
stripped me of all but enough of my power to come over to this forest
which is now my home."
   The {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x told their story; when they had finished, the lady said, "We
do indeed have a common foe, as well as a common ideal." She looked over
the sleeping Queen thoughtfully, almost sadly. "Alas, my powers have not
yet recovered sufficiently to fully revive your Queen. I do, however, know
of a way to gradually restore her to health."
   The lady led the {MK{xn{Mi{xg{Mh{xt{Ms{x over to a bush that grew blue roses. "These
blue roses have medicinal properties. Just by breathing in their vapour,
all but the most mortally ill or wounded will regain their strength. You
may build your keep near this bush; be certain that Buttercup rests in a
room with blue roses."
   "Many thanks, milady," Brian said to the lady upon listening to her
advice. "What may we do for you in return?"
   "Remember your vow to yourselves and each other, as well as to your
Queen," the lady responded. "And remember to treat the forest with care
and respect since we are to be neighbours. Also Brian, Doom and KungFu, be
sure to look after your comrades; for this world is dangerous and you'll
need to keep your wits about you in order to survive. Only by sticking
together can we survive and prosper.
   "My name is {WL{Ci{Br{Ci{Te{Wl{x. I welcome you to Legacy." Embracing Brian and Kung
Fu, the goddess of sorcery vanished, saying: "If ever you need guidance,
feel free to ask me."

   Thereafter, the Knights adopted the blue rose as their symbol, both as
the flower that would heal their Queen and in honour of the goddess {WL{Ci{Br{Ci{Te{Wl{x
whose teaching both Brian and Kung Fu held dear. Through {WL{Ci{Br{Ci{Te{Wl{x, the {NB{Blu{Ne
{NR{Bos{Ne{x became synonymous with the new life Brian and the {CS{Ym{Cu{Yr{Cf {YLords{x sought
for their people; hence, they became the {NO{Br{Cd{Be{Cr{x of the {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x.

Rules Of the Blue Rose

{NR{Bu{Cl{Be{Ns Of t{Bh{Ne {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x

   We conduct ourselves in an upright, courteous manner and treat each other
and others with respect, dignity and consideration. Be chary of your
speech, for your word, once given, should be your bond as we frown upon
hypocrisy. We advocate role-play but not to the point of offending others;
if you are asked to stop role-playing something, {PSTOP{x! Role-play is no
excuse for discourteous, foolish or otherwise immodest behaviour. Another,
related caution is to be careful whom you role-play what in front of; you
never know who might seek some sort of petty self-aggrandisement at the
expense of our {NO{Br{Cd{Be{Nr{x. At the same time, keep a cool head; insults to self
or clan are nothing more than hot air from a buffoon, and should not be
mistaken for actual acts of war.
   If you do wrong, admit it and face whatever consequences you reap from
it; people will respect you for your integrity.
   We may be a PK and War clan but this does NOT mean that we go round
spoiling for a fight. We encourage our members to take any and all
opportunities to practise PK, whether in {RFlaming Sword{x or in an Arena, as
it is good to be ready to put all resources of strength, spells, stealth
and cunning to use as needed. {PHOWEVER{x, we don't just run about insulting
and challenging people hither and yon. Likewise, there is no disgrace in
refusing a useless fight; violence, after all, is a last resort and MOST
problems can be solved through cool reasoning and mutual co-operation.
(More on our war policy later.)
   We of the {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x believe in gender equality. This means, among other
things, that we expect a gentleman to treat a lady with respect, kindness
and consideration. Naturally, we expect that our ladies shall be afforded
the same courtesy. By the same token, in times of war, we will deal with
women who war upon our clan with the same ruthlessness that we would
afford her male colleagues; a female combatant, after all, is still a
combatant, just like her male counterparts.
   Above all, we are a family and community. We expect all who are loyal to
our Queen Buttercup to leave their egos at the door; there is no "I" in
"team" and we are all expected to serve the Order as best we can.  At the
same time, if you need help, don't hesitate to ask those who can help you;
after all, the betterment of each is a necessary condition for the
betterment of all. Besides, what are comrades and friends for?
   Respect your {YLords{x and {YPrinces{x ({YLeaders{x; female {YLeaders{x are still
addressed as {YLord{x or {YPrince{x) and heed their advice, for they have seen and
learnt more than you have and have your best interests (as part of the
interests of the Order as a whole) at heart. If they say to abstain from
fighting, for example, they generally have a good reason for their counsel;
heed it as though the Leader were in fact an Immortal "enlightening" you;
{YLeaders{x are, in fact, chosen for just this sort of wisdom.
   Ranks (including that of {YLeader{x) are a {PPRIVILEGE{x, not a right. Therefore,
treat them (and others about you) with respect. First-time offenders will
receive a warning and/or a qp fine; repeat offenders will receive a stiffer
punishment: a larger qp fine and/or revocation of rank, which the offender
must earn over again (including {YLeadership{x), step by step, at the
discretion of the Leaders. In extreme cases, expulsion may be an
appropriate punishment.
   The purpose of our {NL{Bor{Nd {NW{Bi{Cz{Wa{Cr{Bd{Ns{x is to, among other things, brew potions
and scrolls for the clan. However, they are not in place solely to make
life easier. Like rank, their services are a privilege that should be
treated with respect. At the same time, we encourage our members to learn
other ways of operating beyond merely the use of potions and scrolls;
potions and scrolls are an ADJUNCT to a complete repertoire of fighting,
not the repertoire itself.
   {NA{Bm{Cb{Wassad{Co{Br{Ns{x are important for clan relations, treaties, alliances and the
like. In this world, there is strength in co-operation and our {NA{Bm{Cb{Wassad{Co{Br{Ns{x,
who foster it between and within clans, perform thereby an important
function indeed. Moreover, we hold them sacrosanct and, as such, are NOT to
participate in PK, especially during times of war. {NA{Bm{Cb{Wassad{Co{Br{Ns{x who
voluntarily put up their PK flags will be  relieved of their diplomatic
duties; theirs is NOT the business of war. At the same time, anyone who
attacks, waylays or otherwise molests our {Na{Bm{Cb{Wassad{Co{Br{Ns{x is committing an act
of war against our clan. As such, the offender will know the full wrath of
the entire {NO{Br{Cd{Be{Cr{x of t{Bh{Ne {NB{Blu{Ne {NR{Bos{Ne{x; all competent PKers within the villain's
PK range will seek the miscreant's life in any way they can. Molestation
includes, but is not restricted to, war-time challenges and the placement
of aggressive mobs in their path. Further interpretation shall be at the
discretion of our {YLords{x and {YPrinces{x.
   {NS{Bp{Ci{Be{Ns{x are to be hidden and sneaked at all times; as possible they should
also be lurked, invisible and chameleon-cloaked. Their function is two-
fold: gather information and practise lethal, pragmatic (read, dirty) PK.
   {YLeaders{x should actively observe the rest of the clan; they should also
meet on a regular basis to discuss clan business and membership.
   We encourage our membership to learn as much as they can about Thera, in
terms of eq, geography, skills, spells and questing. Naturally, we also
expect them to learn new ways to PK.
   Ours is a harsh world; the forces of evil may strike at any time.
Therefore, we help each other in any way we can, whether by fetching eq,
spelling each other up, grouping to level or teaching each other to PK.
United we stand, divided we fall.
   PK, whether during peacetime or war, is at the discretion of the {YLeaders
{x {NT{Ba{Cc{Wtici{Ca{Bn{Ns{x and {NM{Ba{Cs{Wt{Ce{Br{Ns{x. While it is good to practise PK, that doesn't mean that we
recklessly put up our PK flags and look for trouble. Likewise during war:
there is a fine line between courage and stupidity. Don't be a fool.
During times of war, our new members will be treated the same way as
{Na{Bm{Cb{Wassad{Co{Br{Ns{x: they are to stay in safe areas, and are not to be molested
lest the varlets curse the day that they ever met a {NK{Bn{Cig{Bh{Nt{x of the B{Clu{Ne
R{Cos{Ne{x (between deaths at our hands). At the same time we do

" Life is filled with indulgent sin
  Beauty is but a tainted facade
  Release your foolish, shattered dreams
  Succumb to the Darkness. "


{cBackground{x 
 
The Kindred fit their name well, for their clan is truly shrouded in
darkness.  They are mysterious, and there is much speculation
surrounding their origins.  They have been certainly linked with the
infamous Army of Darkness, long thought a myth, which means the
Kindred are also definitely the direct descendants of the demon Akira.

The Kindred are an elite group, and although many are curious about
their business, only a select few are allowed to join as members.  It
is no secret that they are considered an "evil" clan, but to them,
evil is subjective.  They see themselves as a blessing to the realm,
for without them, life would be a one-sided and colorless thing.  

The Kindred pride themselves on fierce and cunning battles, fought by
their honor system (which many would consider none at all).  There is
nothing more a member of the Kindred abhors more than "heros" who try
to obtain  glory by exuding false righteousness.  Reality is not made
up of rights or wrongs, but situations, and we will bring down any
clan which attempts to take control by painting untrue pictures.


{cPrinciples of the Kindred{x

1. In becoming one with the Darkness, you pledge your loyalty and very
   soul.  You are a Kindred first, and everything after that.  Any 
   form of mutiny, treason, or disobediance shall be punished swiftly
   and without mercy.
2. The Kindred of the Darkness will always be first and foremost, a PK
   clan.  Although not all members are expected to fight, those who
   don't are expected to support.
3. Honor and mercy are terms used by the weak.  True honor means no
   bounds, this reality has no room for those who set boundaries.  
   Death is our gift, and we shall give it with any and all means.


{cThe Calyx{x

The Kindred are organized in a unique way known as the Calyx, the way
of the Darkness.  Their clan structure can be portrayed as a
pentagon, with everybody following one of five paths -

{YL{ba{Ynt{be{Yrn{x: These are the Leaders of the Kindred.  They give vision and
         direction through the Darkness, and are to be obeyed without
         question at all times.  They come from all other auspices.
{RB{cl{ga{cd{Re{x:   These are the Fighters of the Kindred.  They are the
         strength that is shown to the outside, and may they spill
         the blood of all those who oppose the Darkness.
{HL{ge{ca{Hf{x:    These are the Stealth of the Kindred.  They include spies, 
         assassins, and others who creep through the night, slipping
         past the enemies with the wind, at one with the Darkness.
{NP{ci{gll{ca{Nr{x:  These are the Guardians of the Kindred.  Though they do not
         fight, they represent the very core of the Darkness, for 
         without their help and support, the rest would be nowhere.
{MM{ci{grr{co{Mr{x:  These are the Keepers of the Kindred.  They do not fight
         either, but patiently tend to the wounds of the Darkness,
         within the safety of the deep Caverns.

Remember, one's actual class has nothing to do with his place within
the Darkness.  A cleric might very well become a Leaf, or a warrior a
Guardian.  After passing one's training period as a Disciple and
being regarded worthy, they shall choose their own path.

{RLastly,

To any outsiders, let us give you a warning.  Together, the Kindred
are bound by blood, and it is demon blood at that.  Dare disturb any
one, and you shall find the fury of the Darkness down upon you.{x

During the years that ensued after the {RVamphyri's{x first arrival on 
Thera by using the {CGate{x, they grew in power and might.  Even so, 
their numbers were so tiny that it seemed as if all their toil and 
struggle were for naught.  Living, if one may call it that, faded to 
simply existing. They resided in their high tower built by their undead 
servants and slaves and would  prey on the local citizens at their 
leisure.  Immortal and cold as ice, they knew neither mercy nor remorse. 

It was after many millennia that a piercing {Wlight}x descended from 
the heavens and engulfed the tower containing the {RVamphyri{x. A voice 
from the light spoke with unheard of power and majesty. It sifted 
through the fabric of every vampire's thoughts enmeshing them with its 
gentle yet strong messages. The light shook the {Rvamphyri{x  halls to 
their foundations buried deep within the bones of the land appealing to 
all that was good and just in the fallen {RVamphyri{x. 

It appealed to their ancient wisdom, their long forgotten honour, and 
foremost, their desire to survive. It offered them a blessing, and if 
they would embrace it, they would be granted stature no longer vulnerable 
to the rays of the sun nor the dark words of that which is darkest in 
every beings soul.  They would be glorious in their splendor and all 
would revere the once shackled and cursed immortals. They would be free 
to love and sing and savor the rising glory of the fragile dawn. They 
would be able to create a culture based on joy and laughter, not  
desolation and slaughter. In short, they would become more than they could 
hope to achieve on their own.

While the offered {Wblessing{x seemed like a perfect miracle to the 
majority of the {RVamphyri{x some old fetid creatures could not accept 
that a divine power would lower itself to the menial task of saving the 
lowly {RVampires{x.  And so a great council was held in the main hall 
of the tower and a debate raged for many weeks. Finally it was decided 
by the high council that the time had come to remove the shackles of the 
past and look towards the horizon of a new era for the {RVamphyri{x. 

With that the light became so {Ybrilliant{x to block out all vision 
for many miles from the tower. Those few who could see through the 
blinding haze saw that the tower had shed its protective shields and black 
outer casing leaving only the pure white marble that has always been the 
foundation. All of the tower was transformed from a work of fear to a 
work of beauty, and it was thus with the {Rvamphyri{x themselves.  They 
grew splendorous wings ranging from the {Wpurest white{x to the most 
{kimpenetrable black{x, skin became fair and tinged with rose. Their 
delicate features enhanced their lithe appearance and one would say that 
they did not transform, but merely shed the darkness from themselves. 
Eyes that had known only darkness captured the {Ylight and sparkled{x in 
its glory.

{WAngels{x now, they turned their newfound powers and emotions to the 
great deeds that their ambition asked of them and each in his or her 
own heart rejoiced to be at last {CFree{x.

{WRules of The Divinity{x

act in anyway form or fashion to disgrace the clan or soil its name.

2.  This clan is a family and it's not necessary that you like your

5.  Aid your clan mates and support newbies. This clan is not based on

{W*****Principles of the Divinity*****{x

The Divinity is a clan for the strong of heart who want to make the 
world of Thera a better place for all. We don't expect fame or fortune for 
this. A simple thank you is all we require. Our clan shall help 
everyone from newbies to high-level remorts. At the same time, to protect

players through areas and killing the creatures for them. This clan is

righteousness. If you enjoy helping others and having a strong reliable

Black Claw's History

Many years ago, in a forgotten valley far to the north.  Shadows and 
whispers filled the valley of the Ninja, telling them of a great war 
which headed toward their sanctuary.  Greatninja, the wisest Ninja, 
sent scouts to see if his intuition was right.  Upon the scouts return 
they gave word of a army which stretched as far as the eye could see.  
This malevolent army slaughtered any who opposed them and left nothing 
standing in their path.  All the ninjas knew they could not defeat a 
army of such sheer size.  The Sun-ate Ninja sent word to their 
brothers in the woodlands ... but no word came.  Soon the armies would 
be upon them; ninjas began to prepare for battle.  Some formed battle 
lines in front of the great holy Temple of the Claw and unsheathed 
their katanas, others formed parties and retreated to the mountain 
pass.  With the Temple of the Claw behind them the battle lines were 
drawn.  Hundreds of ninjas waited.  An army could be heard entering the 
valley.  Screams of terror and bloodshed drew near.  Soon, out of the 
woods the dark army flew.  Every ninja sliced through the crowd killing
their foes, not giving up.  They thought the battle was won, as the 
exhausted ninjas took in the thousands of slaughtered dark knights that 
lay around them.  But the war was not over ... another army of dark 
knights formed at the tree line.  Greatninja and the remaining small 
band of ninjas entered the temple.  Knowing they could never defeat the
dark army outside their beloved temple, he revealed a magnificant jade 
shard.  "With this Shard we shall travel to a new land and train new 
ninjas in the way of the Claw."  Greatninja stabbed the Shard into the
center of the Temple and a shimmering gateway emerged.  

Upon materializing on the otherside of this gateway Greatninja met new 
allies.  The ninjas perservered and slowly recontructed the Temple of 
the Claw.  In Thera they will remain, regaining their power until they 
can return to their old realm to overthrow the dark army of the Shogun 
for once and for all.


In Order to Join the Clan

- Must prove their knowledge of Thera.
- Must show the ability to pk or gather equipment for others.
- Must swear alliegance to the Claw and no other clan.

Rules of the Claw

1. A Leader's decision is final and agreed amongst all leaders.
2. If it is in your power to help a clan member do so.
3. No Fighting amongst fellow ninjas, this is punishable by death.
4. Anyone caught in a traitorous act will be declanned and killed.
5. PK is encouraged to help train ninjas to be stronger.
6. Leaders must be elected by unanimous vote of the council.
5. A non-remort Ninja may not participate in a war unless under
   a Sensei's intruction.

Black Claw's Mercenary Rules

1. All ninjas who merc must donate 25% of their fee to the clan.
2. Every ninja should fulfill his contract to the best of his ability.
3. All ninjas should merc for the glory of the Claw.
4. In the event that two ninjas are merc'd to opposing clans those
   ninjas will never attack each other but still fulfill their job.
5. A non-remort Ninja may not participate in a War unless under
    a Sensei's intruction.
